steps.title: Read the 1993 column of the table
steps.content:
The question asks which category had the most members in 1993. The 1993 column shows: Brownies = 1,225 thousand, Ambassadors = 826 thousand, Daisies = 191 thousand, Cadettes = 168 thousand. Brownies is the largest by a wide margin.
  • Choice A — Ambassadors.: Ambassadors had 826 thousand members in 1993 — less than Brownies. ✗
  • Choice B — Brownies.: Brownies had 1,225 thousand members in 1993 — the highest value in the column. ✓
  • Choice C — Daisies.: Daisies had only 191 thousand members in 1993, far below Brownies. ✗
  • Choice D — Cadettes.: Cadettes had only 168 thousand members in 1993, the smallest of the four categories. ✗

steps.title: Confirm the correct choice
steps.content: Brownies’ 1993 membership of 1,225 thousand exceeds every other category by hundreds of thousands. That confirms B is correct.
